deterministic_setup.reason: The resolved `jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4` artifact declares `javax.servlet:servlet-api` as a provided dependency, and many public classes extend or accept `HttpServletRequest`, `HttpServletResponse`, or `HttpServlet`; tests covering those APIs need the servlet API explicitly.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Some client/XML method coverage is possible without servlet API, but server-side and request/response coverage will be unreachable or fail to compile.
No Docker image or environment/system property requirement was found; local Gradle and Native Image runs remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jackrabbit WebDAV exposes servlet-based public APIs, but its POM marks `javax.servlet:servlet-api` as `provided`, so Gradle test scaffolds do not receive it transitively. Meaningful coverage of request/response, header, input/output context, and servlet classes needs the servlet API on the test compile classpath.
